channel.title: #Electronic on Efe Akbalık
channel.description: Recent content in #Electronic on Efe Akbalık

item.title: Organising the Electronics
item.description:
Today i did go to shopping and bought some ( 40pcs ) plastic boxes so i can finally organise my stuff, those boxes are cheap and does their job but there is one problem .

The “i will fill it later” problem

those boxes are good but they are only one size and putting 2 - 3 led or oscillator in it looks funny also is a huge waste of space . “its a big waste of space but i can fill it later with same/similar things” my brain tells me but as we know it generally never happens , but i still do it because putting a coil and a diode in same box because they are both rare and i probably wont buy more later doesnt make me feel good.
